title: 9Pcs Pink Hanging Paper Fan Set Party Decoration Supplies Paper Fan Flowers Decorations for Wall Wedding Birthday Party Supply (Pink)

Pink Paper Fans Party Decorations are Suitable for Various Occasions: This pink paper flower fan decorations are perfect for flower walls or background decoration. Paper flowers fans decorations can be hung on walls, windows, trees, and pink hanging paper fan set is very suitable for decorating newborn showers, birthday parties, wedding decorations, photo shoots, shop windows, and other venues.

Lightweight and Portable: Our paper floral backdrop are made of paper material, flat and space saving when not unfolded, easy to transport or store, durable, and paper fan flowers are an ideal decoration for both indoor and outdoor use.

Easy to Assemble: Each paper fan flower has self sealing stickers on both ends, which can be easily peeled off and pasted, making paper fan flowers easy to transform from a fan to a flower. Paper flowers decorations spring is equipped with a thin rope to help you hang paper fan flowers high, and the hanging decoration is sturdy, helping you quickly create a festive atmosphere. ﻿

Handmade DIY: This paper flowers fans can be easily folded and made together by parents and children, cultivating children's hands-on ability and enhancing parent-child relationships. The completed paper fan flower can not only fan the air, but also decorate the event site.
description: Product features Paper Fan Party Decoration: Different shades of pink paper fan flowers and sizes of paper fan flowers can make the decoration background more layered, creating a dreamy layered background for weddings, birthdays, and photo shoots.
